meta.intent: Create real triage between the lower puppy that is close to the water and the upper-right route that vine is about to worsen.
meta.expectedPath: Solve the lower puppy first, clipping a vine on the way so the counter resets, then pivot into the upper-right pocket before the route taxes stack up.
meta.expectedFailMode: The player tunnels on the vine-threatened upper side first, spends actions protecting that lane, and loses the lower puppy to the rising water.
meta.whatItProves: The prototype can create triage, not just obstacle management.
meta.notes: The growth priority sits in the right-hand approach pocket so vine pressure is visible, but the lower rescue remains the real first obligation because of the pre-flooded row.
